summary: Phase 2 testing complete: Enhanced Invoicing with line items, PDF generation (ReportLab), brand assets, Product Catalogue CSV upload, Business Documents PDF export, and Tax Calculator Auto-fill API. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend components verified working.
features_tested: POST /api/invoices - Create invoice with line items and totals calculation ✓
POST /api/catalogue/upload - CSV file upload and parsing ✓
GET /api/finance/tax-autofill - Get auto-fill data from invoices/expenses ✓
GET /api/finance/tax-autofill?tax_year=... - Get auto-fill for specific year ✓
Frontend: Create Invoice dialog with catalogue integration ✓
Frontend: Tax Calculator Auto-Fill button working ✓

catalogue_upload.description: CSV upload with validation and bulk add

enhanced_invoicing.description: Create, get, update, finalize invoices with line items and PDF generation

brand_assets.description: Upload, list, and get brand logo for invoices

tax_autofill.description: Auto-fill tax data from invoices and expenses

document_export.description: Generate, export to PDF, and save business documents

email_sending.description: Invoice email sending (MOCKED - requires valid SendGrid API key)

elements_verified: Invoice list with invoice number, client, amount, status
Add from Catalogue section with search
Line items with quantity, price, tax rate
Toast notification showing tax year and calculation details
Empty state with Upload File and Add Manually buttons
Recent Documents section with saved documents

sendgrid_email.reason: SendGrid API key required for actual email sending
sendgrid_email.behavior: Returns 500/520 error when attempting to send invoice email

seed_data_creation: Created test invoices and catalogue items during testing. Cleanup performed to remove TEST_ prefixed items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully implemented and tested: 1) Enhanced Invoice Service with line items, totals calculation, PDF generation using ReportLab, and brand logo support. 2) Catalogue service supports CSV upload with validation and bulk add. 3) Document service generates proper PDFs using ReportLab. 4) New Invoicing frontend page at /invoicing with catalogue integration. 5) Tax calculator auto-fill calls backend API and populates fields. 6) SendGrid email integration is MOCKED - requires valid API key for production. All 19 backend tests pass. Previous iterations covered WebSocket notifications, Custom Domains, Team Collaboration, AI Website Builder, Product Catalogue CRUD, and Business Documents wizard.
